title: NIELIT Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 68 Posts
organization: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT)
short_info: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT), an autonomous scientific society under the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India, has released Detailed Advertisement No. NHQ-12/22/2025-NC [3160304] for the recruitment of Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor purely on contract basis. Applications are invited from eligible candidates for various centers across India. The selected candidates will be engaged initially for a period of one year, which may be extended based on performance and requirement.

important_dates.cut-off date for age & experience: Last date of receipt of applications
important_dates.interview_date: To be announced on official website

application_fee.details: Non-refundable Registration Fee: Rs. 500/- per position to be paid online in the NIELIT account: | Bank Account No: 604820100000012 Bank Name: Bank of India IFSC Code: BKID0006048

age_limit.age_details: Purely on Contract Basis (initially 1 year, extendable)

qualification.details: Age Limit: Maximum 50 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation may be applicable as per Government of India rules (not mentioned explicitly, candidates are advised to check notification). | Assistant Professor: | B.E./B.Tech + M.E./M.Tech (or Integrated M.Tech) in relevant branch with First Class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. OR B.E./B.Tech with First Class + Ph.D in relevant branch. For Humanities: Master’s degree with 55% marks + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D as per UGC regulations. | Associate Professor: | B.E./B.Tech + M.E./M.Tech with First Class + Ph.D preferred. Minimum 6 years teaching/research experience (at least 2 years post-Ph.D). At least 6 research publications in reputed journals. | Professor: | B.E./B.Tech + M.E./M.Tech with First Class + Ph.D. Minimum 10 years experience (at least 3 years at Associate Professor level). Minimum 6-10 research publications + Ph.D guidance experience.

vacancy_details.Computer Science Engineering & Allied Br: 01 (One) - Specialization: Computer Science / Computer Application / IT 01 (One)- Specialization: Computer Science Engg & Allied Branches

vacancy_details.Electronics and Communication Engineerin: 02 (Two) - Specialization: Electronics Instrumentation Control / Digital Wireless Communication / IoT / Embedded System
vacancy_details.Computer Science Engineering & Allied Br: 03 (Three) - Specialization: Artificial Intelligence / Data Science / Computer Science & Engineering / Emerging Technologies (Cyber Security / IoT)
01 (One) - Ph.D in Computer Science / AI & ML / Networking / Cyber Security

selection_process: Screening of applications based on documents Document Verification Personal Interview (Online/Offline)
Document Verification: 09:30 AM to 11:30 AM Interview: 11:00 AM onwards
how_to_apply: Candidates must submit duly filled offline application along with self-attested copies of all supporting documents. The application should reach the following address on or before the last date:
Registrar, National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT) NIELIT Bhawan, Plot No. 3, PSP Pocket, Institutional Area, Sector-8, Dwarka, New Delhi - 110077
important_instructions: Only applications received by post/speed post/by hand on or before the last date will be considered. Incomplete applications or applications without fee will be rejected. Candidates must visit https://www.nielit.gov.in/recruitments regularly for updates. No separate call letters will be sent.

faq.question: Q1. What is NIELIT Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NIELIT Faculty Recruitment 2026 is a contract‑based hiring drive for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and Professor posts in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Humanities. The engagement is purely on contract basis for an initial period of one year, extendable based on performance and institute requirements.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are available under NIELIT Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NIELIT has advertised teaching positions at three levels: Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and Professor. These posts are spread across multiple NIELIT centres in streams like Electronics & Communication Engineering and allied branches, Computer Science & Engineering and allied branches, and Humanities (mainly Mathematics and related subjects).

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for NIELIT Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of offline application forms for NIELIT Faculty Recruitment 2026 is 01 June 2026. Applications reaching after this date, or without proper fee and documents, will be rejected and not considered for screening.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NIELIT Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all advertised faculty posts (Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and Professor) is 50 years as on the last date of receipt of applications. Any age relaxation, if applicable as per Government of India rules, should be checked in the detailed notification by the candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for Assistant Professor posts at NIELIT?
faq.answer: For Assistant Professor in Engineering branches, candidates must have B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech (or Integrated M.Tech) in the relevant branch with First Class or equivalent in at least one of the degrees, or B.E./B.Tech First Class with Ph.D in the relevant branch. For Humanities posts, a Master’s degree with 55% marks along with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D as per UGC norms is required.

faq.question: Q6. What are the eligibility criteria for Associate Professor posts at NIELIT?
faq.answer: Associate Professor candidates should possess B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech with First Class in the relevant branch, preferably with Ph.D. They must also have a minimum of 6 years teaching/research experience, out of which at least 2 years should be post‑Ph.D, along with at least 6 research publications in reputed journals or equivalent academic contributions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required qualification and experience for Professor posts?
faq.answer: Professor posts require B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech with First Class along with a Ph.D in the relevant discipline. Candidates must have at least 10 years of teaching/research/industry experience, with a minimum of 3 years at the Associate Professor level, plus a good record of research publications (generally 6–10 or more) and experience of guiding Ph.D scholars as per the detailed norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary (emoluments) offered for NIELIT Faculty posts?
faq.answer: For Assistant Professor posts, the consolidated monthly emoluments are in the range of Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 70,000 (CTC). For Associate Professor posts, the emoluments are in the range of Rs. 1,10,000 to Rs. 1,20,000 per month (CTC), while Professor posts carry consolidated emoluments of around Rs. 1,30,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 per month (CTC).
